title: Export Plan
description: Stage 4c output. One entry per planned export document.

plan_id.description: Stable identifier; recorded in the project manifest.

topic_id.description: Outline topic this plan covers, or `_misc` for the fallback plan. Null when no outline was used.

mode.description: Reorganization mode for this plan. See HANDOFF.md.

items.description: Included content items in planned order.

output_filename.description: Derived per the naming convention in EXPORT_SPEC.md.

outline_used.description: Outline provenance. Null when no outline was applied.

is_misc_fallback.description: True when this plan collects items that matched no outline topic.

unclassified_count.description: When is_misc_fallback is true, the number of items routed here.
